subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Due to lack of time, I write briefly. Praise be to God, the journey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید از عدم فرصت مختصر مرقوم میگردد الحمد لله سفر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
